metadata.name: Cancel Event Due to Severe Weather

description: A severe blizzard forces the cancellation of an outdoor winter festival on the day of the event.

nodes.task_description: Update the event status to 'Canceled' in the master calendar and ticketing system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the status, which automatically halts any further ticket sales.

nodes.task_description: Post cancellation notices on the venue's website, social media channels, and mobile app.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pushes a coordinated cancellation message across all public-facing platforms.

nodes.task_description: Send an email and SMS notification to all ticket holders about the cancellation and refund process.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a bulk communication to all attendees.

nodes.task_description: Notify all scheduled staff and vendors that the event is canceled.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a cancellation notice to all internal and external stakeholders.
